reasons: Looking at the images from different angles, the dog has excellent muscle mass. From the front view, the head shows full temporal muscles and the shoulders are broadly muscled. From the top view, the back is very broad and well-covered, with no sign of the spine being prominent. In the side view, the hindquarters appear well-rounded and strong. There is no scapular winging or sharp borders, and overall the dog appears very well-muscled with no signs of wasting.
